notes:
Farsight patch

- Version 2.1.30.
- Fixed Auto-Soul startup and refresh so it casts independently, verifies the affect, and refreshes before expiry.
- Added Clue Fragment to Auto-Combine stackable items.
- Hardened Auto-Combine against repeated rejected stack attempts.
- Improved chat PM tabs, unread highlighting, and middle-click tab closing.
- Improved character-card click focusing so the full card focuses the client except when clicking card buttons.
- Cleaned up overlay and automation state handling.
